programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Everything Blue: Earth’s Frozen and Fiery Extremes
programme.desc: Venture into Earth's icy and fiery extremes! Explore how life adapts in places where everything seems impossibly blue.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: The Aftermath: What Happens After Extinction
programme.desc: Explore the future of Earth post-extinction. What emerges in the wake of life's disappearance? Discover the aftermath!

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Down to Earth: What Shouldn't Exist on Earth
programme.desc: Uncover phenomena that defy explanation! Explore mysterious objects and anomalies that shouldn’t exist on Earth.

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.desc: Discover innovations replacing traditional methods in energy, medicine, and technology. See what the future holds with 'The Replacements'!

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.desc: Explore the groundbreaking innovations that are transforming our world, from AI to space exploration, and the future of human progress!

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.sub-title: Intelligent Life: Psychic Superintelligence and Global Transformations
programme.desc: Delve into the concept of psychic superintelligence and how it could spark global transformations. What happens when intelligence evolves beyond human limits?

programme.title: What If: Discussed
programme.sub-title: Have We Already Made First Contact?
programme.desc: For over half a century, we've searched for radio signals from extraterrestrial civilizations. Are they ignoring us? Or have aliens already made contact without us knowing it?

programme.title: What If: Humanity
programme.desc: Travel through history and explore pivotal moments that shaped our world. What would you change if you could go back in time?

programme.title: What If: Prehistoric
programme.desc: Who would win in a battle of prehistoric titans? Dive deep into the epic showdown between Megalodon and Mosasaurus!

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Time before Land (as we know it)
programme.desc: Journey back to Earth's earliest days, when oceans ruled and land as we know it had yet to emerge. Discover a watery world!

programme.title: Starbase Update
programme.desc: NASASpaceflight.com's weekly look at the happenings around Starbase.

programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: The Sun’s Fate: Dying, Dimming, or Doubling
programme.desc: Explore the possible futures of our Sun: Will it die, dim, or double? Unravel the mysteries of solar destiny!

programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.desc: Dive into the most extreme 'what if' scenarios across the universe. Prepare for mind-bending cosmic possibilities!

programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: Unwanted Visitors: Black Holes, Killer Whales, and Cosmic Collisions
programme.desc: Dive into the dangers of nature and the cosmos as we face black holes, killer whales, and cosmic collisions head-on!

programme.title: What If: Cosmos
programme.sub-title: Not From Around Here: Humanity in Space
programme.desc: Venture into the future of human space exploration. Discover what life might look like as humanity reaches beyond Earth!

programme.title: What If: Technology
programme.sub-title: Discussed: What If You Got Stuck in a Time Loop?
programme.desc: Do you ever wake up thinking, here we go again? Same stuff, different day? What many of us call "Groundhog Day" but physicists call a "Causal Loop" or "Time Loop".

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.desc: Imagine a world split in half! Dive into scenarios where planets, moons, and entire systems are halved. What survives?

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: 5 Seconds that Could Change the World
programme.desc: Explore catastrophic scenarios where Earth stops spinning, drops to absolute zero, and loses oxygen—all for 5 seconds!

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Exploring the Deepest Places on Earth
programme.desc: Join us as we dive into Earth's deepest mysteries, exploring the extreme depths of our planet, from the Mariana Trench to subterranean caves.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Earth Daze: An World in Reverse
programme.desc: Journey through a world turned upside down! Explore the bizarre and fascinating effects of Earth reversing its course!

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Going Clear: What If Earth and Humanity Became See-Through?
programme.desc: Imagine a transparent world! Discover the surreal and eye-opening impacts if Earth and humanity became see-through.

programme.title: What If: Planet Earth
programme.sub-title: Crash Test: Asteroids, Hurricanes, and Tornadoes
programme.desc: Brace for impact as we simulate collisions with asteroids and the devastating power of hurricanes and tornadoes!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's another windy winter day, and the postal bees are staying indoors-the wind is too strong for their berry bitty wings. "We don't know when the next mail will get through!" It's bad news for Blueberry, who has been anxiously awaiting the next installment of a Patty Persimmon Detective story. If only she could get to the post office in Berry Bitty Dale where her package is waiting!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry, Cherry and the girls form a new band, Strawberry and the Sweet Beats, and prepare to go on the road to perform at the Opening Ceremony of the Berry Big City Games! While master mechanic Berrykin Bruce turns Cherry's tour bus into the band's hotel-on-wheels, Strawberry and her friends pack for the big trip. But the rest of Berry Bitty City points out that someone needs to run the girls' businesses while they are gone.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Berrykins Ed and Earl report to Princess Berrykin and Strawberry that they are certain there is a monster in the berry patch! They saw something with many noses and many tails making weird noises in the bushes. But upon further investigation by Strawberry and her friends, it is discovered that friendly boy Huckleberry Pie was driving his pet-mobile of orphan dogs through the countryside, took a wrong turn and got stuck near Berry Bitty City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Blueberry is disappointed in the girls' lack of enthusiasm for the Patti Persimmon mystery novels, her favorite book series. She finds herself missing the company of her fellow Persimmon fan Huckleberry, and thinks up a great way to get him to visit. She invites Huck to co-write a story with her to submit to an online mystery magazine.. Huck eagerly accepts and comes for a visit.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Mystery of the Disappearing Dog Show
programme.desc: When Huckleberry and Blueberry's Patti Persimmon-style mystery story is rejected by an online mystery magazine, Blueberry and Huck have to come up with a new way to raise support for Huckleberry's Hotel for Homeless Pets back in Berry Big City. Strawberry suggests they hold a big dog show! Plum makes over-ambitious plans to display talents that her dog does not quite have, trying to teach him complicated dance routines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Baby Berrykins are enthralled by a fairytale that Blueberry reads to them for Story Time. Charmed by their reaction, Strawberry suggests that the girls do a "berrytale play" for the kids, sort of a "Story Time On Stage." Plum volunteers to direct it. She envisions a small, simple production-until she hears about a gigantic production of "Snowberry and the Seven Berrykins" that's a smash hit in Berry Big City.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: When the Berry Fairy Came to Stay
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines. Realizing that Strawberry is a very kind & caring person, the little fairy decides to take advantage of the kid's good nature.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: Apple Dumplin' wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin's just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira's estranged sister, Deedee, pays an unexpected visit, while David agrees to talk with one of Jocelyn's students about being "different".

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: When Kate is shamed – both in Mommy and Me and at work – for liking submissive animated porn, she's left wondering exactly the same thing as those she confided in: what's wrong with her? At Tech-cellent! Jenny ups her game in attracting Marvin, but is far from prepared when he takes the bait. And Frankie makes a breakthrough in her disconnection issues with Giselle thanks to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate joins her team at Gaze on a Saturday to work on a pitch, promising Nathan she'll be home in time for family dinner with their parents. When the camaraderie and joking get out of hand, it's up to Kate to rein things in. With her family balance in jeopardy, she rushes to leave the office. On her way out she learns there's been a decision on the Montreal job, and can think of no better counsel on the matter than her own dad. Anne struggles to find a point of connection with her daughter Alice, and Jenny is faced with disconcerting truths about her life and relationship when Ian asks for her help with his Kickstarter project.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Kate's in the doghouse with Nathan – and promises to finally find a new nanny in order to make amends. But when Kate can't find the time, she enlists Eleanor's help who pulls in a ringer of her choosing. In bittersweet news, Kate is offered the promotion she and Mo have been competing for, but keeps it a secret from Nathan. Frankie convinces Giselle to join her in therapy with Anne, and they connect in the unlikeliest of ways. Jenny, eager for a night of debauchery, jumps at the chance to help organize a last-minute bachelorette party, inviting Kate, Frankie, and Anne. Their night leaves them all somewhat bewildered and Jenny forever changed.

programme.title: Workin' Moms
programme.desc: Morning fireworks explode when Kate informs Nathan that she accepted the big promotion, which will take her to Montreal for three months. Kate strikes a deal with Sarah her new nanny and older sister. Meanwhile, Anne compensates for her husband's financial troubles by scheduling in as many clients as possible, and unexpectedly places herself in a dangerous situation. Frankie is revisited by postpartum depression, and Jenny secretly seeks Val's lactation expertise when her new nipple piercing interferes with her breastfeeding.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: It's almost the end of the school year, and Gerry seems to be the only teacher at Xavier who hasn't been offered a full-time contract for next fall. Even after Gerry plays the marriage card, it seems Lisa can't guarantee him anything beyond fulltime substitute. Unwilling to accept this fate, Gerry gets an idea to start his own Charter school. Meanwhile, Robert and Bobbi interview applicants to fill Bobbi's position while she's away on maternity leave. Her initial concern about finding a qualified candidate is replaced with a deep insecurity that she won't even be missed when the candidates prove quite overqualified. Lisa pulls out all the stops to throw an end-of-year faculty party. But when her efforts seem to go unappreciated, Lisa makes a bold move.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.sub-title: Gerry Wants to Make Phys Ed Great Again
programme.desc: It's a new school year and Gerry has finally achieved his goal: full-time Phys Ed! But when he finds out how Bobbi's been teaching Phys Ed, Gerry's appalled, and sets out to teach the course the way it should be taught…or the way he thinks it should be taught, anyways. Meanwhile, Dwyer learns the ropes to his newly appointed position of Vice Principal and Nisha, fresh off her camp counsellor summer job, struggles to reset boundaries with three seniors.

programme.title: Mr. D
programme.desc: Lisa, now married to Alex's father and still reeling from her Xavier departure, sets out to punish the staff by running for the unopposed position of PTA president. Fearing their Lisa-free days may be numbered, Gerry and Robert go to great lengths to block her candidacy. Meanwhile, Malik isn't overly fond of his new job, and Simon and Nisha may be a little too fond of each other…in the school.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Romance
programme.desc: Actress Emma Hutton is determined to help find her friend Hope a perfect match but in doing so, she accidentally tramples on several hearts. When Emma realizes she herself has always loved her good friend Gray, Emma learns love works best when she doesn't meddle with it. A charming romance inspired by Jane Austen's "Emma."

programme.title: Love in Focus
programme.desc: When the hit show actress Jenna Wilde stars in suddenly gets cancelled, the press start circling. To escape the chaos Jenna retreats to a snowy cabin in the mountains. Unexpectedly, she must share this peaceful place with a rude and rugged nature photographer Chris Dixon. Their coolness towards each other starts to thaw when Chris helps Jenna audition for other shows.

programme.title: Austentatious
programme.desc: Lizzie deals with coordinating her family's wardrobe for a family portrait, with constant resistance to her ideas and suggestions of wild animal prints from her mother. Marianne gets a job at Yum Divine (a dessert bistro of sorts), but repeatedly messes up to the point of having her new job on the chopping block. Through Elinor's insistence, and everyone's help, Marianne hangs on to her job—barely. Grant figures out that Emma's love of match-making comes as a therapy for all the divorce cases she handles. He recounts all the terrible dates Emma has sent him on. Lizzie learns that Grant might just love Emma.

programme.title: Romance In The Air
programme.desc: After learning her marketing job is on the line, Eden returns to Lake Tahoe where she used to spend her summers growing up. Intending to relax and recharge so she can tackle her job again, she is surprised to find her childhood friend and sweetheart Riley is still living next door. She finds purpose in helping Riley propel his struggling hot air balloon tour company, and also finds herself drawn to him and their dear past. However, Eden sees Riley and Tahoe as temporary, while her life—and boyfriend—back home await her. She can't admit that she and Riley could have a future, even if that's exactly what she wants. When she's willing to take a risk for what her heart wants, her life will take off with her true love.

programme.title: Jalisco, Don't Backslide
programme.desc: A man hated by his father and in love with a beautiful woman whose brothers do not approve of the relationship and persecute him.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Chile: Episode 2
programme.desc: Chile is at the mercy of weather systems that have shaped the nation. In the South, strong westerlies bring rains that create rich green Valdivian forests, carpeting the neotropic ecozone. The Valdivian forests of Chile are a unique ecosystem harbouring species of a ‘land before time' – The forests of Valdivia represent the unique assemblage of ancient species, both floral and faunal, which today persist as relicts of Gondwanaland.

programme.title: Rainforest Home

programme.title: The Lion Tree

programme.title: Kalahari Meerkats
programme.desc: Recently Priscilla bought an adopted boy pup from a rival gang to the Gosa Burrow. Unfortunately his acceptance into the Gosa group was far from ideal. His life did not get any easier after this

programme.title: Masai Mara: The Big Hunt
programme.desc: When food supply in the Serengeti dwindles, the Masai Mara is a paradise for predators. As the black wildebeests, gazelles, zebras and antelopes make their yearly trip from the south of the Serengeti to the north, nature's best laid trap, the Mara River in Kenya is waiting ahead. Captivating shots filmed under water show how crocodiles prepare for the Big Hunt while other predators lurk on the banks awaiting their bounty. The biggest problems for the migratory animals are the Mara and the Tarek River, where they have to put their lives at risk to get to the other side. A great number of them die as they jump into the river and break their legs, while others are carried away by the drift or drown. Those who are not victims of the river itself risk falling prey to the crocodiles. We entered this unchartered territory, the crocodile domain by heading under water. Follow these predators in and around their habitat and watch prides of lions map out their game plan. In slow-motion, we show you the final showdown between predator and prey. Will it be a successful hunt or will the hoofed animals persevere?

programme.title: Close up with Hippos
programme.desc: This nature documentary shows the many different sides of the Hippo's lives on one September day in two iconic African locations: the Masai Mara-Nationalpark in Kenya, also the setting for the largest annual animal migration on the planet – one and a half million wildebeests and zebras migrate from the Serengeti to Kenya during this time.

programme.title: Hoanib
programme.sub-title: The Secret of the Desert Elephants
programme.desc: The Namib, one of the most hostile deserts on Earth. Without a firm survival strategy, no living soul will make it here. Yet, surprisingly, some species have adapted their lifestyles to these extreme conditions: chameleons, beetles, snakes and mammals are all at home here. The film follows a family of desert elephants that has also adapted to this habitat.

programme.title: Namibia`s Desert Kingdom
programme.desc: Although the dunes are barren, the dry riverbeds show signs of growth. And out of the heat, vast shapes appear. A herd of desert elephants ambles along the dry riverbed sniffing the ground with their lazy trunks. These remarkable creatures can smell the water underground and know where to find it. An abandoned well attracts a troop of chacma baboons, followed by a small herd of oryx and springbok, and finally a group of jackals. None of them has seen the pride of desert lions lying in wait.

programme.title: The Provence coast
programme.desc: The Provence is famed for its endless fields of laven-der, but this lush landscape also has a beautifully mari-time touch: The Côte Bleue! Small, hidden beaches, charming harbour towns, imposing, craggy bays and a uniquely clear light that has attracted painters includ-ing Cézanne and Braque. The coast derives its name from the deep blue water and extends from Marseille to Martigues. This small town is also known as "The Ven-ice of the North", as it is shaped entirely by water: an inland lake, the sea itself, as well as a connecting canal. In the bays of the Calanques, the steeply-walled coastal inlets in the Mediterranean limestone, Lionel Franc is a cliff diver. His personal record is a hight of 36 metres! Ambi is a sculptress. This young artist's work, who moved to Marseille from Madagascar many years ago, is characterised by a dynamic momentum. As a pas-sionate pétanque player, she demonstrates this drive on the boules courts of the port city. John Pendray is Pein-tre officiel de la Marine, an official marine painter. The French state allows just 40 painters to its circle. There are no monetary rewards, but heaps of honour and a very smart uniform!

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Corsica looks like an alpine landscape in the Mediterranean, an island with dramatic rock formations, romantic bays and proud inhabitants who see themselves first and foremost as Corsicans and only then as French. The Greeks in ancient times called the island Kalliste: the beautiful. We explore this fascinating mountain world in the Mediterranean.

programme.title: mareTV
programme.desc: Sardinia is the second-largest island in the Mediterranean. The Sardin-ians themselves say it's a "continent for itself", a virtual world of its own, full of magic: A beach, gleaming in unreal pink shades, red corals protect against the evil eye and the inhabitants seem to remain forever young. On Sardinia, the owners of luxury yachts adopt sheep, fish have gold in their bellies and a giant mussel supplies the material for legendary sea silk. No one is surprised, that the Madonna goes on a sea cruise once a year.

programme.desc: At the girls' campout, Sour launches into a whopper of a yarn about the adventures she and Sweet had in the "Berry Deep Dark Forest." She tries to get Sweet to participate in spinning the tale, but Sour's over-the-top performance leaves Sweet behind. Toward the end, Sour graciously changes the story to pull Sweet into it, giving Sweet the opportunity to toss in an ad lib that makes a nice topper to Sour's story. Sweet is thrilled when everyone applauds her, even Sour, who is impressed by her contribution and proud of her sister.

Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a plumber and starts fixing the fountain. // Kiki's face has turned purple because she ate magical Plumen berries. Kiki accidentally picked magical Plumen berries instead of the delicious rainbow berries she was trying to gather.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: The ground is all wet in Rainbow Village. What's going on? The friends tell Ruby that Jessy's tears have soaked the ground. Rainbow Ruby thinks up the best way to apologize to Mr. Sloth, who loves performances. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a choreographer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: A Treasure Lost, A Treasure Found // Dazzling Dumplings
programme.desc: Thunderbell, Ellie, and Kiki are looking hard for something. It turns out that when Thunderbell was trying on Kiki's crown, he accidentally dropped it and a gem went missing. Kiki sadly says that a princess' crown is worthless without a jewel. // Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that this year they won't be able to enjoy the traditional rainbow dumplings as the recipe was accidentally torn to pieces. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a chef.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: How Does Your Garden Grow // Mystery Gifts
programme.desc: Kiki wanted to make a nice garden so she asked the Poppies to do some gardening but they planted the seeds everywhere in the garden, making an absolute mess. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a gardener.// Ling Ling is setting up a 'Thankfulness' tree at the center of the town square. He tells Rainbow Ruby that he is going to hold an event where the village friends can write notes to people that they are thankful to and hang them up on the tree.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are on a train and they are concerned that the train won't stop. The engine is even smoking! Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a firefighter. // Paige is extremely upset. It turns out that she's been preparing an awesome fashion show but now it had to be cancelled because Gina accidentally spilled a bunch of fruit onto the stage.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: The Rainbow Wave // The Best Pet You Never Met
programme.desc: Rainbow Village friends are gathered together at the lake to surf on the Rainbow wave that only comes once a year and they need some help. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a lifeguard and helps her friends safely enjoy their surfing. // Thunderbell is looking extremely worried. It turns out that his pet fish has gone missing. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a detective and finds out Thunderbell's pet fish's whereabouts.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: A welcome party for Prince Frederick is taking place in Rainbow Village, but the guest of honour isn't having any fun at all. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a party planner. // The village is a total mess from the paint that spilled from up above. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to turn into a clean-up engineer and starts cleaning with her friends.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: Hat Trick // Dancing on the Ice
programme.desc: Everyone is frightened because some visiting birds keep trying to sit on their heads. According to Chirpee, the birds just enjoy sitting on people's heads. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.sub-title: When the Moon was Missing // Trouble in a Bubble
programme.desc: The friends are very tired because Mr. Moon hasn't come to sing them their nightly lullaby. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an Astronaut and flies to space to look for Mr. Moon with her friends. // In Rainbow Village, a super frantic Thunderbell is high up in the air, trapped inside a giant bubble. Thunderbell got trapped in a giant bubble in the middle of a bubble bath. In order to find out a way to bring Thunderbell back to earth, Rainbow Ruby turns into a scientist.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Gina accidentally broke Felicia's house, leaving Felicia homeless. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become an architect and builds a house that suits Felicia's demands. // Gina is extremely worried. She needs strawberries for the Rainbow Fruit Ice Cream Festival that's starting soon but the strawberries are all mixed in with other red objects.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Thunderbell is sad because he's discovered a new fruit and eaten all of it. Now there's none left and he'll never be able to eat that fruit again. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase and transforms into a farmer. // Thunderbell has a terrible tummy ache. Rainbow Ruby becomes a Microbiologist to find out why Thunderbell is sick. Rainbow Ruby uses a microscope to find a bacterium inside the cheesecake Thunderbell had but Felicia accidentally casts a spell that makes the bacterium gigantic.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling takes Rainbow Ruby to Ellie's cabin where she meets mischievous baby stars that fell from the sky. The baby stars were playing together, got separated from their mother and ended up in Rainbow Village. // Kiki is extremely upset because the jewel Prince Frederick gave her as a gift broke. The friends try to glue the broken pieces together but it doesn't work. Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to become a jewelry designer and tries designing jewelry with the broken pieces.

programme.desc: When Ruby and Choco arrive at the village, they find a very worried looking Ling Ling.
